archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Premium, Depth, Mystery) integrated with warm energetic gold/orange African-inspired glowing accents.

typography.heroHeadline: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tighter text-white

layout.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-white/5 bg-[#050505] hidden md:flex flex-col
layout.floatingPanel: fixed right-0 top-0 h-screen w-80 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-l border-white/10 shadow-[-10px_0_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] z-50
layout.spacing: Generous internal padding, p-6 or p-8 for cards.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF6B00] to-[#D4AF37] text-white font-medium rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,107,0,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(255,107,0,0.5)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

cards.metricCard: bg-[#121214] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#FF6B00]/30 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(255,107,0,0.1)] transition-all duration-300
cards.walletCard: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1A1A1A] to-[#0A0A0B] border border-[#D4AF37]/20 rounded-2xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden

components.dragDropZone: border-2 border-dashed border-white/20 rounded-2xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center hover:border-[#FF6B00]/50 hover:bg-[#FF6B00]/5 transition-all bg-[#121214]

heroBackground.description: Abstract warm orange and gold glow used as a highly blurred background blob for the hero section.

artistProfile.description: Profile picture of the artist in the dashboard header/sidebar.

analyticsMap.description: Used as a subtle background visual for the African analytics map section.

motion.panelSlide: framer-motion slide in from right for the floating file interaction panel
motion.chartDraw: Recharts slow animation for line graphs

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using a fixed left sidebar and a main scrollable area.
The Hero Section should use the abstract gold/orange glow image as a severely blurred background blob behind the main text (opacity-20 or opacity-30).
Implement the 'Archive System' with a drag & drop zone. Ensure the right-side floating panel (File Interaction) uses high-end glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-2xl`, `bg-black/60`).
Install and use Phosphor Icons (`@phosphor-icons/react`) for sharp, high-end iconography.
For the Analytics section, use Recharts. Make the lines/bars use the #FF6B00 and #D4AF37 colors.
All interactive elements must include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid='upload-files-btn'`).
Make sure forms (like DSP selection and licensing) use customized Shadcn UI components with dark theme overrides.
Do not use generic Shadcn Card component if it restricts custom borders/hover states. Build the metric cards manually with `div` for the glowing hover effect.
